title: Translate all remaining English text in setup page to Korean
goal: 설정 페이지에서 영어로 남아있는 모든 텍스트를 한국어 번역 딕셔너리에 추가한다. Tools, Playwright, External connections 설명, MCP Presets, Connect 버튼 등을 포함한다.

test_requirements.expected: ko dict has keys for playwright status, install button, description
ko dict has key for section header and description
ko dict has keys for service descriptions
ko dict has keys for preset section header, install/uninstall buttons
ko dict has keys for OAuth buttons

test_requirements.case: All hardcoded English strings in setup page use t() function
test_requirements.expected: no raw English strings remain in Korean mode

constraints: Add translations to the ko dictionary in LanguageProvider.tsx
Also add corresponding en dictionary entries for consistency
Replace all hardcoded English strings in setup/page.tsx with t() calls
Do not change any functionality — only text display
Technical terms (OAuth, MCP, Playwright, API) can stay in English within Korean text
